response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering expertise with 15+ years of experience, this role requires deep specialization in embedded security and networking that is absent from the resume. Most critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is an explicit required qualification and is completely missing. The candidate's recent 4+ years focus on TypeScript/Node.js web development diverges significantly from the embedded C, Linux kernel, and security technologies required. No evidence of experience with MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, network switches, or security attack detection systems.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience across multiple domains, substantially exceeding the 3+ year requirement
Proven ability to rapidly learn and master complex technical domains across languages and platforms
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks) applicable to security-critical embedded systems
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency despite being explicitly required at native level
No demonstrated experience with security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, Captive Portal, encryption, attack detection, tamper detection)
Recent career (4+ years) focused on web stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React); limited recent embedded systems, C, or Linux kernel work
